title: China Stock Gauge Heads for Bear Market as Tech Weakness Extends
summary: A major Chinese stock gauge is on track for a bear market, pressured by weakness in Internet and consumer firms.

title: Tesco Sales Disappoint as Wetter Weather Deters UK Shoppers
summary: Tesco Plc’s sales rose less than expected in the fiscal first quarter as the UK’s biggest supermarket grapples with weaker consumer sentiment and a tough comparison with last year.

title: France to Phase Out Non-Quantum Encryption as Bitcoin Security Concerns Grow
summary: French authorities said that government cybersecurity researchers will stop certifying security products that lack quantum-resistant encryption beginning in 2027.

title: Psychologists Say Patients Are Bringing AI Into Therapy Sessions: Survey
summary: A new APA survey found that more than a third of psychologists have patients using AI as an additional mental health professional, even as clinicians warn that the technology can reinforce delusions.

title: Kentucky files lawsuits against prediction market platforms Kalshi and Polymarket
summary: The lawsuits claim prediction market platforms have been offering unlicensed sports gambling in the state while bypassing local regulations.

summary: The trades came as Coinbase's stock closed down 2.57% at $164.92 on Wednesday, while Robinhood gained 8.78%.
